After business collapse and hardship, Wanfa wins 8 million with the Zhu brothers and rebuilds his company, but old habits return as he and Jincai realise they must reunite.

programme.title: Circle of Life - EP 1
programme.desc: Many believe that emperor penguin chicks from Antarctica are among the cutest babies in the world, yet few realize that these chubby, fluffy little ones face life-and-death challenges from the moment they are born. Even in aquariums thousands of miles away in China, breeding and raising them remains an extraordinary challenge.

programme.title: Giant Panda Yun Chuan and Xin Bao - EP 1
programme.desc: The male giant panda Yun Chuan, now five years old, has a signature skill — eating. His favorite pose is lying down while munching, and no piece of bamboo can escape his jaws. Next door lives Xin Bao, a four-year-old female panda. Since pandas consume large amounts of bamboo daily, even one extra mouth in the same territory could mean food shortages — which is why giant pandas are highly territorial.

programme.title: To My Beloved

programme.title: Av
programme.desc: While hitchhiking from Sofia to Ruse, Kamen meets Avé, a 17-year-old runaway girl. A compulsive liar, Avé keeps inventing new identities and backstories, which threaten to get Kamen deeper and deeper into trouble.

programme.title: Suso's Tower
programme.desc: When his best friend, Suso, dies, Cundo returns home for the first time in 10 years to say good-bye. He discovers Suso had a dream to build a tower so that he could see life from a different perspective. Cundo resolves to realise his friend’s wish.

programme.title: Heavenly Nomadic
programme.desc: A family of nomads dwelling high in the mountains of Kyrgyzstan doesn't need any of the conveniences of modern civilization in order to be happy. But progress is creeping into their lives regardless, destroying legends and traditions as it comes.

programme.title: Helen Dorn: After The Storm
programme.desc: After a celebration in her rural hometown, Karla Petersen is murdered on her way home. Inspector Helen Dorn takes on the case but clashes with local officer Tom Petersen, Karla's brother, who defies warnings to find his sister's killer.

programme.title: Oddball
programme.desc: An eccentric chicken farmer, with the help of his granddaughter, trains his mischievous dog Oddball to protect a penguin sanctuary from fox attacks in an attempt to reunite his family and save their seaside town.

programme.title: Impermanence
programme.desc: The film tells the stories of different people and how they are intertwined surrounding the gruesome death of a man who got thrown out of a window.

programme.title: The Vanishing Soldier
programme.desc: An 18-year-old Israeli soldier flees the Gaza battlefield and heads back to his girlfriend in Tel Aviv only to discover that the military elite is convinced he was kidnapped in the fog of war.

programme.title: Carte Blanche
programme.desc: An uplifting tale of Kacper, a charismatic high school history teacher who hides his progressing blindness from everyone around him to fulfil his educational duties. His methods are unorthodox, sometimes hilarious, and devilishly effective.

programme.title: Bille
programme.desc: In late 1930s Latvia, young Bille grows up in poverty, caught between her mother’s contempt and her father’s alcoholism. Escaping into books and her imagination, she dreams of a better world as she embarks on her path to becoming a celebrated writer.

programme.title: Rival
programme.desc: 9-year-old Roman follows his mother Oksana, an illegal nurse in Germany. Oksana falls in love with 62-year-old Gert who tries to befriend Roman. While spending an afternoon alone with Roman, Gert suddenly dies of a heart attack, leaving Roman alone.

programme.title: Games People Play
programme.desc: An old group of friends gathers to celebrate Mitzi’s surprise birthday party over a nostalgic weekend at an idyllic seaside villa – just like they used to do as teenagers. Mitzi sets off a game that brings old feelings and power dynamics to the surface.

programme.title: Running On Sand
programme.desc: When an Eritrean refugee about to be deported from Israel is mistaken for the Nigerian striker just signed to a struggling soccer team, his fate depends on the team’s success in this charming, socially relevant dramedy.

programme.title: Moon's Walking
programme.desc: On the day of her grandmother’s memorial, 16-year-old Jung-hee escapes a volatile home and goes on a journey in search for the truth behind her grandfather’s disappearance.

programme.title: Good Luck Sam
programme.desc: Sam and Stéphane, childhood friends and ski equipment designers, embark on a wild quest to save their struggling business. They hatch a plan to enter Sam into the Winter Olympics, and have him compete under his father’s home country of Algeria.

Its nanoe™ and Mineral Ion technology infuse moisture deep into strands and scalp, promoting smoother, healthier hair. With Skin Care mode, it even hydrates your skin—your all-in-one beauty tool for effortless styling and daily nourishment. Panasonic EH-NA9M 吹风机采用独家 nanoe™ 奈米水离子与矿物负离子技术，有效滋润发丝与头皮，告别毛躁，打造柔顺亮泽秀发。Skin Care 模式还能为肌肤补水，一机多用，轻松在家享受沙龙级护理体验

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Vileda EasyWring Spin Mop & Bucket Cleaning Bundle Set
programme.desc: The secret weapon for effortless cleaning. 说再见脏地板，迎接闪亮干净！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - La Gourmet Food Steamer
programme.desc: Simplify meal prep with the 2-Tier Stainless Steel Electric Multi Food Steamer. Designed for healthy, fast, and versatile cooking, it allows you to steam veggies, fish, and more simultaneously, preserving nutrients and flavor. Compact and easy to use—perfect for a nutritious lifestyle! 使用双层不锈钢电动多功能蒸锅，轻松做出健康美味的菜肴。专为健康、快捷、灵活的烹饪设计，能同时蒸煮蔬菜、鱼类等食材，最大限度保留营养与原味。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Ultimo Kleen 5-in-1 Laundry Pods
programme.desc: Say goodbye to measuring and mess – simply toss in this laundry pod and let it do the rest! 完美结合洗衣、消毒、柔软、除臭及芳香剂的5合1浓缩洗衣凝珠

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - ASD Hybrid 3-ply Hex Wok 32 & 36cm
programme.desc: This cookware is made with strong stainless steel and a long-lasting non-stick coating from Whitford (USA). Its 7-layer design ensures even heat distribution and helps keep heat longer, providing great cooking results every time. Perfect for those looking for high-quality, easy-to-use kitchen tools. ASD爱仕达316不锈钢不粘炒锅采用三层钢结构与耐高温不粘涂层，结合了不锈钢的耐用与不粘锅的便捷。蜂窝纹理设计省油防粘，食材加热均匀，不怕铁铲和钢丝球刮擦，适合烹饪各种坚硬食材。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Krafter Purple Magic Sheet
programme.desc: South Korea’s no. 1 Home Shopping product! A multi-purpose cleaning sheet that works wonders by effectively removing grease, stains, mould and odors on all surfaces! 韩国电视购物频台爆款！这万能布能有效地清理顽固的污渍， 油脂和气味！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - SINGCHOICE Bone Health Formula & Eyes Nourisher
programme.desc: A daily wellness duo that strengthens bones, supports joints, and protects eyesight. Bone Health Formula combines Japanese shell-derived calcium, fish collagen, and chondroitin to reinforce bones and joints, while Eyes Nourisher adds Japanese blueberries, carrots, and lutein to reduce eye fatigue, filter blue light, and maintain clear vision. 日常双效保养组合，同时守护筋骨与视力。筋骨丸采用日本贝类萃取钙、鱼胶原蛋白与软骨素，强化骨骼、维持关节灵活；亮目丸精选日本蓝莓、胡萝卜与叶黄素，帮助过滤蓝光、缓解眼睛疲劳，维持清晰视力。天然配方、每日补充，让骨骼稳、关节顺、双眼更舒适。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Kinohimitsu Wellsure
programme.desc: A plant-based protein nutritional drink that ensures a balanced intake of nutrients, promoting visible improvements in muscle health, immune resilience, eye health, and digestion. 一种植物性蛋白全营养饮，确保摄取均衡营养，有助于显著改善肌肉健康、增强免疫力、促进眼部健康和消化功能

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Acerpure Clean V2 Cordless Vacuum Cleaner
programme.desc: Transform the way you clean with the Acerpure Clean V2 cordless vacuum, designed for modern living. Its ultra-strong suction power and multi-stage filtration system capture even the finest dust in your homes. Lightweight yet powerful, it makes cleaning quick and comfortable with its ergonomic design and long-lasting battery. Acerpure V2 无线吸尘机， 四种刷头，满足全屋清洁需求。 1.37公斤超轻无线主机，轻盈好超控。三档模式，20000pa强劲气旋吸力，灰尘一扫而空。多角度掌控自如，让您更顺畅地左右移动，滑行或转向。轻巧却强劲有力，是您最佳的清洁伙伴。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Mobot AURA X 4-Wheel Mobility Scooter
programme.desc: One click folds or unfolds the AURA X. Lightweight, portable, and airline-approved, it’s safe, stylish, and travel-ready. iF Design Award 2024 winner—effortless mobility anytime, anywhere. 一按遥控器即可折叠或展开,轻巧便携，折叠后像行李箱一样拖行，配备安全认证电池, 可带上飞机。获iF设计大奖 2024，让日常出行和旅行轻松自在。

programme.title: Keikhlasan Cinta
programme.desc: Rania left her house after her father objected to her desire to become a TV presenter. She became a popular host and later paired with Hilman for a show titled Ikhlas. The two do not get along and often argue. But they try their best to face it together. Hilman manages to persuade her to meet her father.

programme.title: Rahasia Dan Cinta - EP 24
programme.desc: Dwita, the daughter of a prominent entrepreneur finds herself caught in an arranged marriage with Greg - a match orchestrated by their fathers to merge their companies. Aware that Dwita would likely resist this plan, her father assigns her a personal bodyguard, Debu, to keep her in line. As Dwita, Greg and Deby embark on this unexpected journey together, a series of challenges and complications arise, turning Dwita's life upside down.

programme.title: SKOOP! S2 - EP 1
programme.desc: Norfasarie and Huda Ali are both mothers whose online presence is sometimes peppered with the countenance of their young children, whether to share proud mummy moments or as advertising gimmicks. In this season's opener, host Fiza O probes on how much these mummies are willing to share about their children online while sieving out the bad from the good that comes with sharenting.

programme.title: Permintaan Terakhir Abah
programme.desc: Abah's Last Request tells the story of Abah who wants to unite his children who are increasingly separated due to differences of opinion among them. Abah is determined to fix the situation by making a strange request, which is for his children to come home and gather in the village because his cancer is getting chronic and he believes that this may be his last Ramadhan and Syawal. The children who are at odds are willing to bury their egos by fulfilling Abah's last request and finally come back.

programme.title: Ultraman Omega - EP 3
programme.desc: There are many universes, they may be similar, but they have their own characteristics, as in the case of Omegaverse. A universe that's similar to the original Ultra universe, but has its own ultras. Omega is a Space Garrison rookie who was sent to Earth on a mission to protect it from monsters that appear mysteriously.

programme.desc: The journey of a nomad to the peaks of the highlands in Borneo. Exploring gastronomy and cuisine while getting to know the customs and cultures of various ethnic groups on the Land of the Hornbills.
